I Replaced 20 Hours of Manual Work With 2 Hours of Direction Using OneManArmy

The world's first hosted AI army platform puts three best-in-class bots behind one solo operator.

No Docker. No terminal. No API key hunting. Here's my unfiltered take.

Get OneManArmy + My $682 Bonus Pack

I've been running AI tools in my business for over a year. I know what works, what breaks, and what's hype.

What Is OneManArmy?

A hosted command dashboard that deploys three powerful AI bots from one cloud platform.

Paperclip

AI CEO

Plans goals, designs roles, proposes hires. You approve every decision.

OpenClaw

Field Operator

Executes skills, runs workflows, takes action via web, Telegram, or Discord.

Hermes

Intelligence Specialist

Self-learning memory that writes its own skills and remembers your business.

The Promise

Deploy your entire AI army in under 5 minutes with zero technical setup. No servers. No Docker. No weekend lost to configuration.

Is OneManArmy Right For You?

This IS for you if:

  • You're a solo operator or small team trying to scale without hiring
  • You've tried self-hosting AI bots and spent more time fixing than using them
  • You're paying $100+/month for disconnected AI tools that don't talk to each other
  • You want AI workers that remember your business, not generic chat responses
  • You value your time more than your money (this saves both)

This is NOT for you if:

  • You love tinkering with Docker and terminal commands (you don't need this)
  • You're looking for a magic button that runs your business without you (bots need direction)
  • You expect perfection on day one (there's a learning curve, like any powerful tool)
  • You're not willing to spend 30 minutes learning the system

What OneManArmy Actually Does For Your Business

Deploy AI Workers in 5 Minutes, Not 5 Hours

Stop wrestling with installations. The 3-question wizard gets you from signup to running bots faster than making coffee.

Three Best-in-Class Bots, One Dashboard

Paperclip for planning, OpenClaw for execution, Hermes for memory. No other platform offers all three. That's the moat.

Stop Paying for 4+ Disconnected Tools

ChatGPT Plus. Claude Pro. Writing tools. Workflow tools. OneManArmy replaces the stack — for a one-time payment, not monthly subscriptions.

Your AI Workers Actually Remember

Hermes stores your business context, client details, and campaign history. No more re-explaining your business every Monday.

Run From Anywhere

Web dashboard for deep work. Telegram/Discord for quick commands. Your army works where you work.

Command Dashboard — One view of all three bots

ChatGPT and Claude are general-purpose AI. OneManArmy deploys three specialized bots — a planner, an executor, and a memory system — that work together as a team. It's like the difference between a Swiss Army knife and a toolbox.
Yes. The wizard asks 3 questions. Your bot is live immediately. First mission can run in the same session.
